brandAsset.name: Golden Circle
brandAsset.description: Simon Sinek's WHY → HOW → WHAT framework

how.details: LINFI approaches each project as a unique precision engineering challenge, measuring and manufacturing each floor hatch to exact specifications, integrating electric motors for effortless operation, and ensuring the solution blends invisibly into the existing floor or becomes a stunning design feature in its own right.
how.statement: Through millimeter-precise custom engineering and seamless integration

why.details: LINFI exists because transitional spaces—the connections between levels—deserve the same attention to craftsmanship, safety, and aesthetic integration as any other element in a high-end home. We believe access solutions should enhance, not compromise, interior design.
why.statement: We believe that every element of a luxury home should combine flawless function with elegant form

what.details: LINFI manufactures four distinct product lines: electric floor hatches with quiet motors and remote control, walkable glass hatches that showcase underlying spaces, hidden hatches that disappear into existing floors, and 100% waterproof outdoor hatches that bring daylight into basements while providing garden access.
what.statement: Exclusive, custom-made electric floor hatches in glass, hidden, and waterproof configurations

brandAsset.name: Brand Essence
brandAsset.description: The heart and soul of your brand

proofPoints: Custom-made to the millimeter for perfect fit in any space
Quiet electric motors with wall switch or remote control operation
100% waterproof outdoor solutions that bring natural daylight to basements
Seamless integration with any flooring material (wood, tile, PVC, carpet)
Full-service approach from measurement to professional installation
frameworkData.discriminator: Millimeter-precise custom manufacturing combined with electric operation and seamless aesthetic integration—transforming purely functional elements into luxury design features
frameworkData.audienceInsight: Luxury homeowners and design professionals understand that true quality is revealed in the details others overlook—they seek solutions where form and function are equally refined, and they're willing to invest in custom craftsmanship that elevates every aspect of their living environment
frameworkData.emotionalBenefit: Pride in owning a home where every detail reflects uncompromising quality and thoughtful design, with the confidence that comes from knowing access solutions are both beautiful and completely safe
frameworkData.essenceNarrative: LINFI represents the intersection of precision engineering and luxury design, where functional access becomes an elegant architectural statement. We transform the mundane necessity of floor access into bespoke solutions that elevate both the aesthetic and experiential quality of high-end living spaces.
frameworkData.functionalBenefit: Safe, effortless access to multi-level spaces with precision-engineered, custom-fitted floor hatches that operate flawlessly and integrate perfectly
frameworkData.selfExpressiveBenefit: Demonstrates refined taste and appreciation for craftsmanship, showing that you value excellence in every detail of your home, even in elements others might overlook

proofPoints: Custom-made to exact millimeter specifications for perfect fit
Quiet electric motors eliminate manual lifting and falling hatch risks
100% waterproof outdoor solutions tested for Dutch weather conditions
Seamless integration with any flooring material without visible seams
Full-service delivery including professional measurement and installation
frameworkData.differentiator: The combination of millimeter-precise custom manufacturing, electric operation for effortless use, and the ability to create completely hidden or showcase glass solutions that integrate perfectly with any interior aesthetic
frameworkData.emotionalValue: Peace of mind knowing that every access point in your home combines uncompromising safety with elegant design, and the satisfaction of owning bespoke solutions crafted specifically for your space
frameworkData.targetAudience: Luxury homeowners, architects, and interior designers working on high-end residential projects who demand custom solutions where safety, aesthetics, and flawless operation are non-negotiable
frameworkData.functionalValue: Custom-manufactured floor hatches that fit perfectly to the millimeter, operate effortlessly via quiet electric motors, integrate seamlessly with existing floors, and provide completely safe, long-lasting access to multi-level spaces
frameworkData.coreCustomerNeed: Safe, beautiful, and effortless access to basements, wine cellars, attics, and outdoor spaces that integrates seamlessly with luxury interior design rather than compromising it
frameworkData.promiseStatement: LINFI promises to deliver precision-engineered floor access solutions that seamlessly integrate into your luxury interior while providing effortless, safe operation for decades to come
frameworkData.onlynessStatement: Only LINFI can deliver electric, custom-made floor hatches that disappear into your existing floor or become stunning glass features because we combine precision Dutch engineering with full-service craftsmanship from measurement to installation
measurableOutcomes: Zero visible gaps or misalignment in installed hatches
Effortless one-touch operation for all users regardless of strength
Long-term waterproof performance in outdoor installations
Maintained aesthetic integrity of interior design
frameworkData.selfExpressiveValue: Reflects your commitment to excellence in every detail of your home and your appreciation for precision craftsmanship that transforms functional necessities into design statements

brandAsset.name: Mission & Vision
brandAsset.description: What you do today and where you're headed

frameworkData.forWhom: Luxury homeowners, architects, and interior designers who demand uncompromising quality in every detail of high-end residential spaces
frameworkData.whatWeDo: Design, manufacture, and install custom-made electric floor hatches—including glass, hidden, and waterproof solutions—that provide safe, effortless access while integrating seamlessly with premium interiors
frameworkData.howWeDoIt: Through millimeter-precise custom engineering, full-service consultation from measurement to installation, and unwavering commitment to safety, quality, and aesthetic integration in every project
frameworkData.impactGoal: To fundamentally shift how the luxury residential market perceives and specifies floor access solutions—from afterthought to integral design element
frameworkData.boldAspiration: To be specified by default in every high-end residential project across Europe where multi-level access is required, with LINFI becoming synonymous with precision-crafted floor access solutions
frameworkData.missionOneLiner: Elevating luxury living through precision-crafted access solutions
frameworkData.valuesAlignment: Precision craftsmanship (precisiewerk), uncompromising safety (veiligheid), custom excellence (op maat), and aesthetic integration guide every decision and project
frameworkData.visionStatement: To become the definitive standard for luxury floor access solutions throughout Europe, recognized as the brand that transformed floor hatches from overlooked functional elements into celebrated design features that enhance architectural excellence
frameworkData.missionStatement: To craft precision-engineered floor access solutions that seamlessly elevate luxury living spaces across the Netherlands, combining Dutch engineering excellence with bespoke craftsmanship to transform functional necessities into elegant design elements
successIndicators: Specified in 50%+ of luxury residential projects in the Netherlands
Expanded operations to serve Belgium, Germany, and UK markets
Featured regularly in leading European architecture and interior design publications
Recognition as the premium standard by Dutch architects' associations
Zero safety incidents across all installations
frameworkData.desiredFutureState: A future where luxury homeowners and design professionals automatically think of LINFI when considering floor access, where our solutions are featured in leading architectural publications, and where our craftsmanship sets the industry standard for quality and integration
frameworkData.stakeholderBenefit: Homeowners enjoy safer, more beautiful homes with enhanced spatial connectivity; architects and designers gain a reliable partner for custom solutions that realize their vision; the broader industry benefits from elevated standards for access solutions
frameworkData.missionVisionTension: The mission focuses on current excellence in the Dutch market through bespoke craftsmanship, while the vision pushes toward European-scale recognition and industry transformation—requiring balance between maintaining artisanal quality while scaling operations and market presence

brandAsset.name: Social Relevancy
brandAsset.description: Your brand's societal and environmental impact

brandAsset.name: Purpose Statement
brandAsset.description: The reason your organization exists beyond profit

frameworkData.mechanism: By manufacturing bespoke floor hatches to the millimeter, integrating them seamlessly into existing interiors, and equipping them with quiet electric motors and safety features that eliminate traditional access barriers
frameworkData.statement: To elevate living spaces by seamlessly connecting levels with precision-crafted access solutions that blend safety, beauty, and effortless functionality
frameworkData.pressureTest: Does this create genuine value beyond profit? Yes - LINFI transforms overlooked transitional spaces into functional, beautiful elements that enhance daily living and unlock the potential of entire home levels that might otherwise remain disconnected or underutilized
frameworkData.impactDescription: LINFI unlocks the full potential of multi-level living spaces by transforming functional necessities (floor hatches) into elegant design elements that enhance spatial flow, bring natural light to hidden areas, and provide safe, effortless access to previously underutilized spaces like basements and wine cellars
frameworkData.mechanismCategory: Through precision engineering and custom craftsmanship

frameworkData.coreFear: Mediocrity, mass production, or creating something that lacks quality or distinction
frameworkData.strategy: Develop mastery in precision engineering and custom manufacturing to deliver exclusive, made-to-measure solutions
frameworkData.brandGoal: To realize the vision of perfect, custom-made floor hatches that seamlessly integrate luxury, safety, and functionality
frameworkData.coreDesire: To create things of enduring value and beauty through precision craftsmanship
frameworkData.giftTalent: Exceptional craftsmanship (vakmanschap), precision engineering to the millimeter, ability to create seamless integration with any interior
frameworkData.shadowWeakness: May be perceived as expensive or inaccessible; perfectionism could lead to longer lead times
frameworkData.contentStrategy: Visual storytelling of completed projects, technical deep-dives into craftsmanship, customer testimonials about transformation, behind-the-scenes of the creation process
frameworkData.archetypeInAction: LINFI embodies the Creator through their emphasis on 'op maat gemaakt' (custom-made), precision work, and the transformation of functional elements into aesthetic 'eye catchers'. Every hatch is a unique creation tailored to exact specifications.
frameworkData.customerExperience: Consultative and collaborative, treating each project as a unique creation. Full-service approach from measurement to installation ensures the customer's vision is perfectly realized.
frameworkData.marketingExpression: Showcase the craftsmanship process, highlight before-and-after transformations, emphasize the bespoke nature of each solution, and demonstrate technical mastery
frameworkData.competitiveLandscape: In a market of standard floor hatches, LINFI positions as the exclusive, custom solution for discerning homeowners and design professionals who refuse to compromise on aesthetics or quality
frameworkData.storytellingApproach: Focus on the journey from vision to reality, the artisan's attention to detail, and the lasting value of custom-made quality

brandAsset.name: Brand Story
brandAsset.description: Your brand's past, present and future

frameworkData.originStory: LINFI was founded by craftspeople who recognized that standard floor hatches compromised the aesthetics of luxury interiors. They saw homeowners and designers struggling to find solutions that balanced functionality with beauty, safety with seamlessness.
proofPoints: Electric operation for effortless, safe use
frameworkData.abtStatement: Luxury homeowners invest in beautiful interiors, BUT standard floor hatches compromise their design vision and safety, THEREFORE LINFI creates custom-made, precision-engineered floor hatches that seamlessly integrate beauty, safety, and functionality.
frameworkData.worldContext: In a world of mass production and standardization, luxury homeowners and design professionals face a challenge: how to maintain aesthetic integrity while solving practical access needs. Standard floor hatches disrupt beautiful interiors and compromise design visions.
frameworkData.elevatorPitch: LINFI creates custom-made luxury floor hatches that transform functional access into seamless design features—precision-engineered for safety and beauty.
frameworkData.manifestoText: We believe every element of your home deserves to be extraordinary. That's why we refuse to accept standard solutions when custom craftsmanship is possible. Every floor hatch we create is precision-engineered to the millimeter, designed to integrate seamlessly with your vision, and built to last generations. We don't just provide access—we create eye catchers. We don't just install hatches—we realize possibilities. Because in luxury design, there are no small details. Only opportunities to demonstrate that true quality is custom-made.
valuesInAction: Precision engineering demonstrated in millimeter-accurate custom manufacturing
Customer-centric service through full consultation and installation support
brandMilestones: Established as Netherlands specialist in luxury floor hatches
Created seamless hidden hatch integration system
Expanded to dual locations (Veenendaal and Ede)
Built reputation among architects and interior designers
frameworkData.empathyStatement: We understand that your home is a reflection of your taste and investment. You shouldn't have to compromise on aesthetics or safety when it comes to any element—including floor hatches.
frameworkData.founderMotivation: A commitment to precision engineering and the belief that every element of a luxury home—even access points—deserves to be custom-made and beautifully integrated
frameworkData.coreBeliefStatement: We believe that true luxury lies in the details, and that custom-made craftsmanship should never be compromised for convenience.
frameworkData.authorityCredentials: Specialists in custom-made electric floor hatches with precision engineering to the millimeter. Full-service approach from measurement to professional installation. Based in Veenendaal and Ede, serving discerning clients throughout the Netherlands.
keyNarrativeMessages: Every millimeter matters in luxury design
Custom-made solutions that honor your vision
Safety and beauty are not mutually exclusive
From functional necessity to design feature
frameworkData.philosophicalProblem: The belief that functional elements should be hidden or compromised rather than celebrated as part of a holistic design
frameworkData.stakesCostOfInaction: Living with unsightly, unsafe, or poorly integrated access solutions that detract from the home's value and the owner's enjoyment. Missing opportunities to create stunning design features that enhance rather than interrupt spaces.
frameworkData.customerSuccessVision: A home where every detail reflects your vision—where even the floor hatches are conversation pieces, where safety and beauty coexist perfectly, and where custom craftsmanship elevates everyday functionality into art
frameworkData.transformationPromise: Transform functional access points into seamless, safe, and stunning design elements that enhance your luxury interior
frameworkData.customerExternalProblem: Need safe, functional access to basements, wine cellars, or attics without disrupting the aesthetic flow of luxury interiors
frameworkData.customerInternalProblem: Frustration with having to choose between functionality and beauty; feeling that standard solutions diminish their investment in premium design

brandAsset.name: Core Values
brandAsset.description: Fundamental beliefs that guide your brand

ownValue.name: Naadloze Integratie (Seamless Integration)
ownValue.description: The distinctive LINFI value: the ability to make functional elements disappear into—or enhance—luxury interiors. This is what sets LINFI apart: not just making floor hatches, but creating solutions that honor and elevate the customer's complete design vision. It's the intersection of technical mastery and aesthetic sensitivity.

anchorValue1.name: Vakmanschap (Craftsmanship)
anchorValue1.description: Deep commitment to precision engineering and artisanal quality in every custom-made solution. This is the foundation of everything LINFI creates—work done by skilled craftspeople (vakmensen) who take pride in millimeter-perfect execution.

anchorValue2.name: Veiligheid (Safety)
anchorValue2.description: Unwavering focus on creating solutions that are safe to walk on, operate effortlessly, and protect users from risks. Safety is non-negotiable and integrated into every design decision, from electric motors to tempered glass to waterproof seals.

frameworkData.valueTension: The creative tension exists between Craftsmanship (taking the time to do it perfectly) and Innovation (pushing boundaries with new solutions). This tension drives LINFI to continuously improve while never compromising on quality—innovating within the discipline of precision.

aspirationValue1.name: Innovatie (Innovation)
aspirationValue1.description: Continuous evolution of floor hatch technology—from developing 100% waterproof outdoor solutions to creating seamless hidden integration systems. LINFI aspires to lead the category through technical advancement.

aspirationValue2.name: Duurzaamheid (Sustainability)
aspirationValue2.description: Building solutions that last generations, reducing waste through quality and longevity. As LINFI grows, there's opportunity to further emphasize sustainable materials and energy-efficient operations.

goals.title: Redefine the Floor Hatch Category
goals.description: Transform floor hatches from hidden necessities into celebrated design elements that architects and designers actively incorporate into their visions
goals.theoryOfChange: By consistently delivering precision-engineered, aesthetically stunning solutions and building relationships with the design community, LINFI will shift perception from 'floor hatches as problems to hide' to 'floor hatches as design opportunities to showcase.'
goals.measurableCommitment: Become the specified brand in 50% of luxury residential projects in the Netherlands requiring custom floor access solutions

goals.title: Zero-Compromise Safety Standard
goals.description: Establish LINFI's electric, precision-engineered hatches as the safety benchmark for the industry, eliminating accidents related to floor access
goals.theoryOfChange: Through electric operation, precision engineering, and rigorous testing, LINFI eliminates the risks associated with manual hatches (falling, pinching, structural failure), making luxury homes safer for families.
goals.measurableCommitment: Achieve zero safety incidents across all installed LINFI hatches; develop and publish industry-leading safety standards for custom floor hatches

goals.title: Generational Quality Legacy
goals.description: Create floor hatches built to last 50+ years, reducing waste and establishing a new standard for longevity in home improvement
goals.theoryOfChange: By using premium materials, precision engineering, and timeless design, LINFI hatches will outlast multiple home renovations, reducing the environmental impact of replacement cycles and establishing quality over quantity.
goals.measurableCommitment: Develop a 50-year warranty program; implement a take-back and refurbishment service for LINFI hatches, creating a circular model

frameworkData.mtpNarrative: LINFI exists to challenge the assumption that functional elements must compromise aesthetics. We envision a world where every detail of a luxury home—even access points—reflects the owner's vision and the designer's artistry, where safety and beauty are inseparable, and where custom craftsmanship is the standard, not the exception.

brandIntegration.positioningLink: These goals reinforce LINFI's positioning as the Creator archetype—building things of enduring value—and the Sophistication personality dimension. They elevate the brand beyond product sales to category leadership and legacy-building.
campaignDirections: Customer legacy stories (hatches serving multiple generations)
brandIntegration.internalActivation: Train all team members on the MTP and goals; integrate safety and longevity metrics into production processes; celebrate milestone projects that exemplify the transformative vision
communicationThemes: Design elevation: showcasing floor hatches as architectural features
Safety leadership: educating on risks of standard solutions
Generational investment: emphasizing longevity and value
Craftsmanship legacy: celebrating the artisans behind each creation

frameworkData.massiveTransformativePurpose: To elevate every functional element of luxury living into an opportunity for beauty, safety, and seamless design.

brandAsset.name: Brand Personality
brandAsset.frameworkData: [{"name":"Meticulous","weAreThis":"Precision-engineered to exact specifications","description":"Obsessive attention to detail and precision in every millimeter","butNeverThat":"Good enough or approximately right"},{"name":"Refined","weAreThis":"Hoogwaardige en op maat gemaakte oplossingen","description":"Elegant, sophisticated, and bespoke in design and execution","butNeverThat":"Mass-produced or standard"},{"name":"Reliable","weAreThis":"Safe, durable, and built to last","description":"Trustworthy craftsmanship with long-lasting quality and safety","butNeverThat":"Experimental or unproven"},{"name":"Discerning","weAreThis":"Premium materials and expert craftsmanship","description":"Selective about materials, methods, and clients who appreciate quality","butNeverThat":"Budget-friendly or compromise-based"}]

brandVoiceguide.voiceDescription: Linfi speaks as a confident craftsman addressing discerning homeowners. The voice is grounded in technical precision—'tot op de millimeter nauwkeurig', 'vakkundige montage'—yet warm and consultative. Sentences are declarative and unhurried, often structured as gentle rhetorical questions ('Een mooi interieur verdient toch een bijpassende toegangsoplossing?'). The brand uses 'wij' and 'u' consistently, maintaining respectful distance while inviting collaboration ('we denken graag met u mee'). Repetition of key phrases ('op maat', 'optimaal genieten', 'stijlvolle manier') creates a reassuring rhythm. The tone is quietly proud—never boastful—anchored in guarantees ('gegarandeerd een eeuwigheid mee') and material specificity ('gelaagd/gehard veiligheidsglas', 'roestvrijstalen frame').
contentGuidelines: OBSERVED: Lead with exclusivity and luxury positioning ('exclusieve en luxe vloerluiken', 'hoogwaardig', 'high-end')
OBSERVED: Emphasize precision and craftsmanship ('tot op de millimeter nauwkeurig', 'vakkundige montage', 'precisiewerk')
OBSERVED: Focus on longevity and quality guarantees ('gegarandeerd een eeuwigheid mee', 'een leven lang mee')
OBSERVED: Use benefit-driven language that connects product features to lifestyle outcomes ('optimaal genieten van de ruimte', 'stijlvolle en praktische manier')
RECOMMENDED: Always include safety messaging when discussing technical specifications
RECOMMENDED: Balance technical detail with emotional benefits in product descriptions
RECOMMENDED: Use customer journey language that guides from problem to solution
writingGuidelines: OBSERVED: Use direct address with 'u' (formal Dutch) consistently throughout all copy
OBSERVED: Employ short, declarative sentences for key benefits (average 12-15 words)
OBSERVED: Lead sections with benefit-focused subheadings ('optimaal ruimtegebruik', 'veilig beloopbaar', 'onopvallend')
OBSERVED: Repeat core value propositions across sections for reinforcement ('op maat', 'exclusief', 'veilig')
OBSERVED: Use active voice with first-person plural ('Wij nemen alleen genoegen met', 'We bespreken graag')
RECOMMENDED: Maintain 2:1 ratio of benefit statements to feature descriptions
RECOMMENDED: Use rhetorical questions sparingly to engage reader ('Een mooi interieur verdient toch een bijpassende toegangsoplossing?')
RECOMMENDED: Include specific numbers and statistics to build credibility (410+ installations)
brandVoiceguide.voiceSample: LINFI is dé specialist in het vervaardigen van elektrische, exclusieve en luxe vloerluiken op maat. Wie een vloerluik, kelderluik of zolderluik wil laten maken is vaak op zoek naar precisiewerk. Wij nemen alleen genoegen met het beste resultaat. Bij LINFI staan veiligheid en kwaliteit voorop, maar ook oogstrelend design vinden we belangrijk. Dankzij de vakkundige montage en productie gaat een vloerluik op maat gegarandeerd een eeuwigheid mee.
writingSamples: Bij LINFI maken we hoogwaardig elektrische vloerluiken voor woningen en buitensituaties. Wie een vloerluik op maat nodig heeft, is op zoek naar precisiewerk. Alle luiken worden namelijk tot op de millimeter nauwkeurig gemeten en gemaakt in onze werkplaats. Ons perfectionisme is wat ons onderscheid en maakt dat wij kelderluiken, zolderluiken en vloerluiken op maat leveren van de hoogste kwaliteit. Onze volledig naar wens en met de hand gemaakte vloerluiken gaan gegarandeerd een leven lang mee. Mede dankzij vakkundige montage, verzonken in de vloer en naadloos aansluitend op uw interieur.

Wij gaan altijd voor de hoogste kwaliteit vloerluik in combinatie met een geweldige uitstraling. Onze elektrische vloerluiken zijn altijd beloopbaar, onafhankelijk van de afwerking. Een mooi interieur verdient toch een bijpassende toegangsoplossing? Wij laten u met een elektrisch vloerluik op maat graag optimaal genieten van de ruimte in uw woning.

Maatwerk gaat verder dan een optimaal passend product en precisiewerk. Het betekent ook dat we uw wensen meenemen in het ontwerp van het vloerluik. Wij bieden vier type vloerluiken als basis: elektrische vloerluiken, glazen vloerluiken, verborgen vloerluiken, vloerluiken voor buiten en waterdichte vloerluiken. Ieder type vloerluik kunnen we volledig aanpassen naar uw wens. Mogelijkheden waar u aan kunt denken zijn o.a.: het materiaal, de vorm, de kleur en het type aansturing.

Onze hoogwaardige vloerluiken worden handgemaakt en daardoor zijn we in staat om samen uw perfecte vloerluik te creëren. Zo kunt u kiezen voor een transparant luik met gelaagd/gehard veiligheidsglas. Deze vloerluiken zijn eenvoudig schoon te maken en omlijst met een fraai roestvrijstalen frame. Heeft u voorkeur voor een vloerluik dat minder opvalt? Dan kiest u misschien eerder voor een verborgen vloerluik. Deze vloerluiken kunnen we bekleden met hetzelfde materiaal als de rest van uw vloer.

ads.description: Lead with material or guarantee ('100% waterdicht', 'gegarandeerd een leven lang mee'). Single-sentence body copy. No superlatives, no urgency language. CTA remains consultative ('Bespreek uw wensen met een specialist'). Visuals carry luxury positioning; copy stays factual.

email.description: Structured in short blocks (3–4 sentences). Open with acknowledgment of inquiry, close with concrete next step ('We komen het vloerluik bij u inmeten'). Slightly warmer than website—'graag' and 'samen' appear more frequently. Still formal address. Bullet points for options/materials. Signature includes team member name and role.

video.description: Voiceover mirrors website rhythm—measured, declarative. On-screen text uses short technical phrases ('Tot op de millimeter', 'Vakkundige montage'). No music-driven hype. Pacing slow enough to appreciate craft. Interviews with vakmensen use first-person plural ('Wij meten...', 'Wij monteren...'). End card: soft CTA, contact info.

website.description: Unhurried, consultative paragraphs (80–150 words). Rhetorical questions invite reflection. Technical terms appear naturally ('gelaagd/gehard veiligheidsglas') without explanation—assumes informed audience. Repetition of anchoring phrases ('op maat', 'optimaal genieten') creates rhythm. Formal 'u/uw' throughout. CTAs are soft invitations ('neem vrijblijvend contact op') rather than commands.

socialMedia.description: Shorter declaratives (20–40 words). Lead with craft detail or project location ('Dit verborgen vloerluik in Zandvoort...'). Maintain 'wij/u' formality even in brief posts. No emoji, no exclamation marks. Images do the enthusiasm; copy stays grounded. Hashtags minimal, Dutch-language, functional (#vloerluik #maatwerk).

antiPatterns: Til je woning naar een hoger niveau

examplePhrases.text: Wij nemen alleen genoegen met het beste resultaat
Tot op de millimeter nauwkeurig gemeten en gemaakt
Optimaal genieten van de ruimte in uw woning
Een mooi interieur verdient toch een bijpassende toegangsoplossing?

brandStyleguide.designPhilosophy: Architectural luxury through sharp geometry (0px radius), premium gold accents, full-bleed photography of custom installations, and generous whitespace — no soft edges or decorative flourishes.

headlines: Exclusieve en luxe vloerluiken op maat

brandStyleguide.archetypeReasoning: LINFI vertoont alle kernkenmerken van het RULER-archetype: controle over kwaliteit ('tot op de millimeter nauwkeurig'), leiderschap in de categorie (exclusieve positie in luxe segment), premium positionering ('hoogwaardig', 'exclusief'), en het leveren van status door uitmuntendheid. De brand belooft niet transformatie (MAGICIAN) of creatieve expressie (CREATOR), maar beheersing, perfectie en de zekerheid van onberispelijke kwaliteit die generaties meegaat. Net als Mercedes en Rolex staat LINFI voor controle, vakmanschap en het leveren van oplossingen die autoriteit en verfijning uitstralen.
logoGuidelines: Primary logo is white 'LINFI' wordmark on dark backgrounds (visible in header)
Black version available for light backgrounds
Logo uses clean, modern sans-serif letterforms with generous spacing
Maintain clear space around logo equal to the height of one letter
Logo works best at larger sizes to preserve legibility and brand impact
Use high-contrast placement — white on black or black on white
Logo appears to use custom or modified letterforms for distinctive brand identity
logoDonts: Don't place logo on busy photographic backgrounds without sufficient contrast
Don't compress or distort the letterforms — maintain original proportions
Don't use low-contrast color combinations (e.g., gold on white)
Don't add effects like shadows, outlines, or gradients to the logo
Don't scale below minimum legible size (approximately 100px width)
Don't recreate or retype the logo — always use official artwork
colorDonts: Don't use the gold (#B59032) as a text color on white backgrounds — insufficient contrast for accessibility
Don't mix warm gold (#CAA33F) and luxe gold (#B59032) in the same visual element
Don't use semantic colors (mint green, blush pink, ice blue) for brand expression — reserve for UI feedback only
Don't create new shades or tints — use the defined palette consistently
Don't use pure black (#000000) and deep charcoal (#263238) interchangeably — each has specific usage contexts
Don't place light neutrals (#F5F6F7, #DDDEDF) on white without additional visual separation

photographyStyle.mood: OBSERVED: Sophisticated, architectural, aspirational luxury with emphasis on spatial design and natural light integration
photographyStyle.subjects: OBSERVED: High-end residential interiors featuring installed floor hatches, architectural details showing glass and stainless steel materials, modern minimalist spaces with clean lines, integration of indoor-outdoor living spaces
photographyStyle.composition: OBSERVED: Wide-angle architectural shots emphasizing space and light, detail shots showing craftsmanship and material quality, hero images with dramatic circular/geometric floor hatch as focal point, natural daylight creating warm ambiance

photographyGuidelines: OBSERVED: Feature installed products in high-end residential settings with premium finishes and modern architecture
OBSERVED: Emphasize natural light and spatial openness, showing how floor hatches connect different levels
OBSERVED: Use warm, natural lighting that highlights material quality (glass, stainless steel, wood)
OBSERVED: Include architectural context showing integration with luxury interiors
RECOMMENDED: Capture detail shots of precision engineering and craftsmanship (frame details, glass quality, seamless integration)
RECOMMENDED: Show products in use or partially open to demonstrate functionality
RECOMMENDED: Include lifestyle context with subtle human presence (shadows, reflections) without making people the focus
illustrationGuidelines: RECOMMENDED: Use technical line drawings for specification sheets showing precision measurements and engineering details
RECOMMENDED: Create clean, minimalist diagrams showing installation process and product configurations
RECOMMENDED: Employ architectural-style cross-section illustrations to explain structural integration
RECOMMENDED: Use subtle, sophisticated iconography for feature callouts (waterproof, electric, safety, custom)
imageryDonts: Avoid stock photography that looks generic or budget-focused
Never show cluttered or dated interiors that undermine luxury positioning
Avoid harsh artificial lighting or overly stylized color grading
Don't use busy compositions that distract from the product's clean design
Avoid showing products in isolation without architectural context
Never include visible branding or logos that compete with the product aesthetic
Avoid imagery suggesting quick/easy DIY installation rather than professional craftsmanship

graphicElements.usageNotes: Architectural luxury aesthetic with sharp geometry, minimal decoration, and emphasis on premium photography. All UI elements maintain 0px border-radius for a crisp, modern feel.
brandShapes: Circular architectural elements (visible in hero imagery)
Clean linear borders with 1px stroke weight
visualDevices: Full-bleed hero imagery with text overlay
Language selector with flag icon + dropdown
Cookie consent modal with sharp corners
decorativeElements: Subtle gradient overlays on hero imagery
Minimal box-shadow for depth (0 0 80px 0 rgba neutral-trans-20)

graphicElementsDonts: Avoid rounded corners or soft shapes that contradict the sharp architectural aesthetic
Don't use heavy shadows or depth effects beyond the subtle 80px neutral shadow
Avoid decorative flourishes, patterns, or playful graphic elements that undermine the luxury positioning

patterns: RECOMMENDED: Subtle architectural grid overlay for backgrounds using #F5F6F7
textures: No heavy textures — clean, polished surfaces only
patternsTextures.usageNotes: Minimal pattern usage to maintain architectural clarity. Backgrounds serve as clean canvases for photography and content, with occasional subtle gradients for visual interest.
backgrounds: Black (#000000) for header and premium contrast sections
White overlays on hero imagery for text legibility

iconographyStyle.colorUsage: Primary gold (#B59032) for active states, dark gray (#263238) for default, white for dark backgrounds
iconographyStyle.usageNotes: Sharp, minimal line icons matching the architectural aesthetic. Hamburger menu uses 3-line horizontal stack. Flag icons for language selection. All icons maintain 0px corner radius for consistency with brand geometry.

iconographyDonts: Don't use rounded or soft icon styles that conflict with the sharp brand geometry
Avoid filled icons except for specific accent cases
Don't mix icon weights — maintain consistent 1px stroke across all icons

gradientsEffects.name: Blue Gradient
gradientsEffects.usage: OBSERVED: Accent elements, potential CTA backgrounds

gradientsEffects.name: RECOMMENDED: Primary Luxury Gradient
gradientsEffects.usage: RECOMMENDED: Hero overlays, premium CTAs, accent highlights

layoutPrinciples.usageNotes: Layout emphasizes architectural precision with sharp alignment, consistent spacing intervals, and generous negative space. Content sections are cleanly separated with subtle borders or whitespace rather than heavy visual dividers.
compositionRules: Hero sections use full-bleed imagery with centered text overlay
Buttons maintain 2px solid borders with internal padding
Modal dialogs use consistent internal spacing with 1px borders
Header maintains fixed positioning with black background for premium contrast
layoutPrinciples.whitespacePhilosophy: Generous whitespace for premium, architectural feel — content breathes with ample padding and margins

visualLanguage.summary: Linfi employs an architectural, precision-driven visual language characterized by sharp rectangular geometry with zero border-radius, creating a sophisticated and authoritative aesthetic. The design leverages generous whitespace, subtle layering through minimal shadows, and a refined color palette anchored by luxurious gold accents against clean white and neutral backgrounds. The overall impression is one of premium minimalism with strict geometric discipline.

components.cardStyle: Sharp rectangular containers with 0px border-radius, thin 1px borders in light gray (#DDDEDF, #D1D8E0), minimal shadows (0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)), generous internal padding (30-40px), clean separation between content blocks
components.inputStyle: Sharp rectangular fields with thin 1px borders (#D9D9D9), white backgrounds, no border-radius, focus states with subtle shadow (0 0 0 2px) in brand color, clean typography
components.buttonShape: Rectangular with 0px radius, solid color fills, medium padding (12px vertical, 24px horizontal), uppercase or sentence-case text in Poppins font, no gradients, crisp edges
components.spacingSystem: Consistent 15px base unit with multiples (30px, 45px, 60px) for section spacing, generous margins between content blocks, strict alignment grid, ample breathing room around all elements

heroPattern.reasoning: De hero toont een grote full-width achtergrondafbeelding van een luxe interieur met een ronde stoel. De tekst 'Exclusieve vloerluiken' en CTA-button 'PLAN EEN AFSPRAAK' staan als overlay op de afbeelding, typisch voor een immersive full-bleed pattern.

visualLanguage.promptFragment: Use sharp rectangular shapes with 0px border-radius on all elements—no rounded corners anywhere. Apply thin 1px borders in light gray (#DDDEDF) to define containers and cards. Use subtle shadows sparingly: 0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1) for slight elevation on cards, avoid bold or heavy shadows. Backgrounds should be clean white (#FFFFFF) with alternating light neutral sections (#F5F6F7, #F0F2F5) for visual rhythm. Use gold (#B59032) only for primary CTAs and premium accents—never as backgrounds. Buttons are sharp rectangles with solid fills (gold or black), no gradients, medium padding. Maintain generous spacing: 30-60px between major sections, 15-30px internal padding in containers. Typography is clean and minimal using Poppins. Strict grid alignment with symmetrical layouts. Avoid: rounded corners, heavy shadows, gradients on buttons, busy patterns, tight spacing. Do: embrace whitespace, use geometric precision, maintain architectural cleanliness, apply gold sparingly for luxury emphasis.

colorApplication.accentUsage: Gold (#B59032, #CAA33F) used sparingly for premium emphasis on CTAs and key highlights, dark navy (#404D5E, #48576A) for secondary elements, pastel tints (#E5F3FF, #E6F6ED, #FFE6EC) for subtle background differentiation
colorApplication.buttonStyle: Solid fills using primary gold (#B59032) or black (#000000) with sharp rectangular shapes, no rounded corners, minimal hover states with subtle opacity or color shifts
colorApplication.backgroundApproach: Clean white (#FFFFFF) primary backgrounds with alternating light neutral sections (#F5F6F7, #F0F2F5) for visual separation, occasional warm cream tones (#FAF5EB, #FEFBE7) for accent areas

styleguideColor.name: Luxe Gold
styleguideColor.notes: Primary brand color detected by framework. Used for accents and premium brand elements throughout the site.

styleguideColor.name: Soft Cream
styleguideColor.notes: Secondary brand color detected by framework. Not visible on homepage screenshots but present in stylesheets as a supporting color.

styleguideColor.name: Pure Black
styleguideColor.notes: Strong neutral detected by framework. Used for header background, text, and high-contrast elements throughout the interface.

styleguideColor.name: Slate Gray
styleguideColor.notes: Strong neutral detected by framework. Used for secondary text and UI elements providing softer contrast than pure black.

styleguideColor.name: Ice Blue
styleguideColor.notes: Info background color from Bricks theme. Not visible on homepage screenshots — present in stylesheets for informational UI states.

styleguideColor.name: Mint Green
styleguideColor.notes: Success background color from Bricks theme. Used for positive feedback and success states in forms and notifications.

styleguideColor.name: Blush Pink
styleguideColor.notes: Danger background color from Bricks theme. Not visible on homepage screenshots — reserved for error states and critical alerts.

styleguideColor.name: Deep Charcoal
styleguideColor.notes: Dark background color from Bricks theme. Strong usage as a primary dark surface color, visible in various UI elements.

styleguideColor.name: Soft White
styleguideColor.notes: Light background color from Bricks theme. Used extensively for light surfaces, backgrounds, and creating visual separation.

styleguideColor.name: Silver Gray
styleguideColor.notes: Border color from Bricks theme. Used for subtle borders, dividers, and creating visual boundaries between sections.

styleguideColor.name: Graphite
styleguideColor.notes: Background color variable. Strong usage as a dark neutral surface color, providing depth and contrast in the design.

styleguideColor.name: Warm Gold
styleguideColor.notes: Primary hover state color. Used for interactive elements and hover effects, complementing the primary gold (#B59032).

styleguideLogo.description: White uppercase wordmark 'LINFI' in bold geometric sans-serif font on black background

brandRule.message: Anti-pattern — never use "ontdek de mogelijkheden" (Brand Voiceguide).
Anti-pattern — never use "laat je inspireren" (Brand Voiceguide).
Anti-pattern — never use "unieke oplossingen voor elke ruimte" (Brand Voiceguide).
Anti-pattern — never use "transformeer je interieur" (Brand Voiceguide).
Anti-pattern — never use "de ultieme luxe ervaring" (Brand Voiceguide).
Anti-pattern — never use "waar vakmanschap en design samenkomen" (Brand Voiceguide).

brandRule.pattern: til je woning naar een hoger niveau
brandRule.message: Anti-pattern — never use "til je woning naar een hoger niveau" (Brand Voiceguide).
Anti-pattern — never use "exclusieve designs die indruk maken" (Brand Voiceguide).
Anti-pattern — never use "vraag nu een offerte aan" (Brand Voiceguide).

persona.name: Sophie Janssen, The High-End Interior Architect
persona.occupation: Interior architect or designer specializing in luxury residential projects
persona.education: Master's degree in Architecture or Interior Design
persona.personalityType: Sophie is creative, meticulous, and client-focused. She prides herself on finding innovative solutions that marry form and function. She values reliable partners who can deliver custom solutions on time and to exact specifications, understanding that her reputation depends on every detail of her projects.
goals: Deliver exceptional, unique projects for clients
Build a network of reliable, quality suppliers
Create seamless, integrated design solutions
Maintain reputation for excellence and attention to detail
Expand portfolio with innovative luxury projects
frustrations: Suppliers who can't deliver custom specifications
Products that compromise design vision
Unreliable delivery timelines
Limited options for luxury, made-to-measure solutions
Safety concerns with standard products
behaviors: Maintains a curated list of trusted suppliers
Specifies exact requirements and dimensions
Visits supplier showrooms and facilities
Recommends preferred suppliers to clients
Stays updated on new products and innovations
persona.quote: I need suppliers who understand that in luxury design, there's no room for 'almost.' Every millimeter matters, and the solution must be invisible or intentionally spectacular.
persona.bio: Sophie runs a boutique interior architecture firm in Amsterdam, specializing in high-end residential renovations. She regularly specifies custom floor hatches for her projects, particularly for clients with wine cellars, basement access needs, or outdoor terrace connections. She values LINFI's precision engineering and ability to create solutions that integrate seamlessly into her design vision.
buyingTriggers: New luxury residential project
Client request for specific feature
Need for custom-made solution
Recommendation from fellow professionals
Discovery of innovative product solution
decisionCriteria: Ability to deliver exact custom specifications

persona.name: Robert Vermeulen, The Estate Developer
persona.occupation: Luxury real estate developer or high-end property investor
persona.education: Business or real estate development background
persona.personalityType: Robert is business-savvy and quality-conscious. He understands that premium details differentiate luxury properties in the market and justify higher price points. He seeks reliable partners who can deliver consistent quality across multiple projects and values solutions that add tangible market value.
goals: Differentiate properties with unique luxury features
Maximize property values and sale prices
Build reputation for quality developments
Establish reliable supplier partnerships
Create signature features that attract buyers
motivations: Higher profit margins on premium properties
frustrations: Generic features that don't differentiate properties
Suppliers who can't scale across multiple projects
Quality inconsistencies
Products that don't justify premium pricing
Installation delays that impact project timelines
behaviors: Specifies premium features in development plans
Builds relationships with specialized suppliers
Showcases unique features in property marketing
Seeks solutions that add measurable value
Plans multiple projects simultaneously
persona.quote: In the luxury market, it's the unique details that close the sale. A custom glass floor hatch over a wine cellar isn't just functional—it's a selling point that justifies the premium price.
persona.bio: Robert develops exclusive residential properties in the Netherlands, focusing on high-end villas and luxury apartments. He regularly incorporates custom floor hatches into his developments, particularly for properties with wine cellars, basement access, or outdoor terrace features. He values LINFI's ability to deliver consistent quality across multiple units and their understanding of what luxury buyers expect.
buyingTriggers: New luxury development project
Need for distinctive property features
Buyer demand for premium amenities
Competitive market positioning
Successful implementation in previous project
decisionCriteria: Impact on property value and marketability

persona.name: Thomas de Graaf, De Residentieel Architect
persona.tagline: Ontwerpt exclusieve woonhuizen waar elk detail telt
persona.occupation: Architect, eigenaar van een kleinschalig architectenbureau gespecialiseerd in high-end woningbouw
persona.education: MSc Bouwkunde, TU Delft of Academie van Bouwkunst
persona.personalityType: Thomas is een esthetisch gedreven architect die design als kunst beschouwt. Hij streeft naar tijdloze ontwerpen waarin elk element — van vloer tot plafond — een bewuste keuze is. Hij wil geïnspireerd worden door productleveranciers, niet alleen geïnformeerd. Hij zoekt partners die zijn designvisie begrijpen en meedenken over maatwerkoplossingen.
interests: Architectuur en design magazines (Eigen Huis & Interieur, Dezeen)
goals: Elk project moet een architectonisch statement zijn
Betrouwbare leveranciers vinden die maatwerkoplossingen leveren
Zijn portfolio uitbreiden met onderscheidende projecten
Klanten verrassen met innovatieve detailoplossingen
Erkend worden als toparchitect in het residentiële segment
frustrations: Producten die het ontwerp verstoren of concessies vereisen
Leveranciers die niet meedenken in maatwerkoplossingen
Standaardproducten die niet passen bij een high-end project
Gebrek aan technische documentatie en BIM/Revit-bestanden
Lange levertijden die de planning verstoren
behaviors: Zoekt inspiratie via platforms als HOOG.design, Pinterest en architectuurbladen
Specificeert producten op basis van esthetiek en integreerbaarheid in ontwerp
Bezoekt showrooms en beurzen om producten fysiek te ervaren
Vertrouwt op persoonlijke netwerken en referenties van collega-architecten
Wil Revit/BIM-bestanden om producten direct in ontwerp te verwerken
persona.quote: Een vloerluik moet onzichtbaar opgaan in het ontwerp — of juist een bewust designelement zijn. Ik zoek leveranciers die snappen dat het om het totaalplaatje gaat.
persona.bio: Thomas runt een boutique architectenbureau in de Randstad en ontwerpt exclusieve villa's en renovatieprojecten in het hogere segment. Hij wordt regelmatig gepubliceerd op HOOG.design en in architectuurtijdschriften. Voor hem is een vloerluik geen standaardproduct maar een integraal onderdeel van zijn ontwerp. Hij schrijft Linfi voor omdat de maatwerkmogelijkheden en het design-niveau passen bij zijn projecten.
buyingTriggers: Nieuwbouwproject voor een veeleisende particuliere opdrachtgever
Renovatie van een monumentaal pand waar standaardoplossingen niet passen
Inspiratie opgedaan via HOOG.design of een beurs
Positieve ervaring van een collega-architect
Behoefte aan een vloerluik dat naadloos integreert in een vloerontwerp
decisionCriteria: Betrouwbare levertijden die passen in projectplanning
Track record in vergelijkbare high-end projecten
Persoonlijke service en meedenken door leverancier

persona.name: Peter Bakker, De Luxe Utiliteitsarchitect
persona.tagline: Ontwerpt exclusieve commerciële gebouwen waar design en functionaliteit samenkomen
persona.occupation: Architect / partner bij een architectenbureau gespecialiseerd in high-end commerciële projecten (boetiekhotels, premium kantoren, exclusieve zorgfaciliteiten, luxe retail)
persona.personalityType: Peter is een design-bewuste architect die exclusieve commerciële gebouwen ontwerpt waar esthetiek en functionaliteit even belangrijk zijn. Hij werkt aan boetiekhotels, premium kantoren, luxe zorgfaciliteiten en high-end retail waar elk detail bijdraagt aan de exclusieve uitstraling. Voor toegangsoplossingen zoekt hij naar maatwerk dat naadloos integreert met het interieurconcept en kan functioneren als architectonisch statement. Hij waardeert leveranciers die vakmanschap, ontwerpflexibiliteit en technische betrouwbaarheid combineren.
goals: Exclusieve projecten realiseren die opdrachtgevers onderscheiden
Architectonische elementen vinden die functioneel én visueel bijzonder zijn
Samenwerken met leveranciers die maatwerk op hoog niveau kunnen leveren
Naadloze integratie van technische oplossingen in het designconcept
Projecten opleveren die erkend worden in vakpublicaties
motivations: Projecten succesvol en zonder problemen opleveren
Erkend worden als betrouwbare partner door opdrachtgevers
Bijdragen aan een veilige en toegankelijke gebouwde omgeving
frustrations: Standaardoplossingen die de exclusiviteit van het ontwerp ondermijnen
Leveranciers die niet kunnen leveren op het vereiste kwaliteitsniveau
Gebrek aan ontwerpflexibiliteit voor unieke situaties
Technische beperkingen die het architectonische concept beperken
Onvoldoende aandacht voor naadloze esthetische integratie
behaviors: Selecteert producten op basis van designkwaliteit, maatwerkmogelijkheden en vakmanschap
Bezoekt showrooms en referentieprojecten om materialen en afwerking te beoordelen
Werkt nauw samen met interieurarchitecten en opdrachtgevers aan het totaalconcept
Zoekt directe relaties met gespecialiseerde fabrikanten voor maatwerk
Waardeert leveranciers die proactief meedenken over ontwerpoplossingen
Verwacht professionele, consultative communicatie met technische diepgang
persona.quote: Ik heb geen tijd voor leveranciers die niet kunnen aantonen dat hun product voldoet aan de eisen. Geef me een DoP, een BIM-object en een realistische levertijd — dan kunnen we zaken doen.
persona.bio: Peter werkt als projectarchitect bij een middelgroot bureau dat kantoorgebouwen, scholen, zorgcomplexen en retailpanden ontwerpt. Hij is verantwoordelijk voor de materiaalselectie en detaillering van zijn projecten. Bij vloerluiken denkt hij aan toegang tot technische ruimtes, vluchtroutes of onderhoudspunten. Hij schrijft Linfi voor wanneer er een robuust, gecertificeerd vloerluik nodig is dat voldoet aan brandveiligheidseisen en belastingsnormen — en dat op tijd geleverd kan worden.
buyingTriggers: Utiliteitsproject met technische kruipruimte of kelder die toegankelijk moet blijven
Renovatie van bestaand kantoor of zorggebouw met vloerluik in vluchtroute
Bouwfysisch adviseur die Linfi aanbeveelt op basis van certificeringen
Bestek dat specifieke eisen stelt aan brandwerendheid of belasting
Behoefte aan een betrouwbaar vloerluik voor openbare of commerciële ruimte

persona.name: Martijn van der Berg, The Luxury Home Renovator
persona.location: Utrecht or Amsterdam metropolitan area, Netherlands
persona.occupation: Senior executive, entrepreneur, or business owner
persona.education: University degree, likely in business or engineering
persona.personalityType: Martijn is detail-oriented and values quality over cost. He appreciates craftsmanship and takes pride in his home as a reflection of his success. He seeks solutions that combine functionality with aesthetic excellence and is willing to invest in premium products that offer long-term value.
goals: Create a distinctive, high-end living space
Maximize functionality without compromising aesthetics
Showcase unique features like wine cellars
Ensure safety for family members
Increase property value through premium upgrades
motivations: Pride in home ownership and presentation
frustrations: Standard solutions that don't fit unique spaces
Safety concerns with traditional floor hatches
Visible, obtrusive access points that disrupt design
Products that require frequent maintenance
Difficulty finding suppliers who understand luxury requirements
behaviors: Researches extensively before making purchase decisions
Consults with architects and interior designers
Prioritizes custom-made solutions over off-the-shelf products
Values professional installation and full-service offerings
Willing to travel to showrooms for in-person consultations
Leest reviews en testimonials van andere klanten
Vergelijkt prijzen en specificaties tussen aanbieders
Vraagt meerdere offertes op voordat hij een beslissing neemt
persona.quote: I want my home to be perfect in every detail. A floor hatch shouldn't just be functional—it should be an invisible part of the design or a stunning feature that guests admire.
persona.bio: Martijn is a successful entrepreneur living in a renovated canal house in Utrecht. He's currently upgrading his basement into a climate-controlled wine cellar and wants a glass floor hatch that allows him to showcase his collection while maintaining the elegant aesthetic of his living room. Safety and seamless integration are non-negotiable for him.
buyingTriggers: Home renovation or new construction project
Need for safe basement or attic access
Desire to showcase wine cellar or special room
Recommendation from trusted design professional
Seeing installed examples at other luxury homes

product.name: Elektrische Vloerluiken (Electric Floor Hatches)
product.description: Custom-made electric floor hatches operated by a quiet, powerful motor via wall switch or remote control. Engineered for safe, effortless opening and closing with precision fit to the millimeter. Designed for luxury homes requiring seamless access to basements, attics, or storage spaces without manual effort or safety risks.
product.pricingDetails: Pricing based on custom dimensions and specifications
features: Wall switch or remote control options
Safe to walk on when closed
benefits: No risk of falling hatches or injury
Safe for all family members including children
Convenient access to basement or attic spaces

product.name: Glazen Vloerluik (Glass Floor Hatches)
product.description: Walkable glass floor hatches featuring strong layered or tempered safety glass with stainless steel frames. Custom-designed to showcase underlying spaces like wine cellars while maintaining full walkability. Available in standard and custom shapes including half-round designs. Creates stunning visual effects while providing safe, functional access.
product.pricingDetails: Pricing based on dimensions, glass specifications, and custom shapes
features: Layered or tempered safety glass construction
benefits: Creates stylish spatial effects and visual interest
Showcases wine cellars or special rooms below
Natural light transmission to lower levels
useCases: Wine cellar showcase in living areas

product.name: Verborgen Vloerluik (Hidden Floor Hatches)
product.description: Seamlessly integrated floor hatches that blend invisibly into existing flooring. Can be covered with the same material as surrounding floors including wood, tiles, PVC, or carpet. Features stainless steel frame construction with custom dimensions for perfect integration. Ideal for maintaining uninterrupted interior aesthetics while providing functional access.
product.pricingDetails: Pricing varies based on dimensions and flooring material integration requirements
features: Compatible with wood, tiles, PVC, carpet, and other flooring materials
benefits: No visual disruption to floor design
Preserves property value and design integrity
useCases: Spaces where visible hatches would disrupt design

product.name: Vloerluik Buiten / Waterdicht Vloerluik (Outdoor/Waterproof Floor Hatches)
product.description: 100% waterproof floor hatches engineered for outdoor use, connecting basements to gardens or terraces. Made with strong safety glass to allow natural daylight into underground spaces while providing direct outdoor access. Custom-fitted for outdoor environments with complete water ingress protection. Combines functionality with weather resistance.
product.pricingDetails: Pricing based on dimensions, waterproofing specifications, and outdoor installation requirements
benefits: Brings natural daylight into basement spaces
Direct access from garden or terrace to basement
Safe and durable in all weather conditions

competitor.name: Metaal Art
competitor.description: Metaal Art is een metaalbewerkingsbedrijf uit Amersfoort dat gespecialiseerd is in het ontwerpen en produceren van exclusieve, op maat gemaakte stalen interieurelementen zoals deuren, trappen, vloerluiken en beloopbaar glas.
competitor.valueProposition: Handgemaakte stalen constructies van de hoogste kwaliteit, volledig op maat gemaakt met alles onder één dak: van inmeten en 3D-ontwerp tot productie en montage door ervaren vakmensen.
competitor.targetAudience: Particulieren en professionals in Nederland die op zoek zijn naar exclusieve, op maat gemaakte stalen interieurelementen voor hun woning of project.
differentiators: Alles onder één dak (inmeten tot montage)
competitor.pricingDetails: Prijzen op aanvraag via een kosteloze en vrijblijvende offerte. Voor stalen deuren is er een 3D-configurator die direct inzicht geeft in de kosten.
competitor.toneOfVoice: Enthousiast, authentiek, nuchter en trots op het ambacht. Ze gebruiken actieve, toegankelijke taal met een stoer randje ('vonken, vuur, lasers').
competitor.visualStyleNotes: Industrieel, ambachtelijk en strak. De focus ligt waarschijnlijk op het tonen van het productieproces (vonken, vuur) gecombineerd met strakke eindresultaten.
strengths: Volledige ontzorging van inmeten tot montage
weaknesses: Minder gespecialiseerd in vloerluiken dan Linfi
Geen vermelding van elektrische of waterdichte luiken
Positionering is meer 'stoere ambacht' dan pure luxe
Minder focus op naadloze integratie met vloersoorten

competitor.name: Vinotilus
competitor.description: Vinotilus is gespecialiseerd in het bouwen van ondergrondse wijnkelders onder bestaande of nieuwe woningen. Ze maken gebruik van het Franse Hélicave concept om binnen enkele dagen een volledig geventileerde en geklimatiseerde ruimte te creëren voor het optimaal bewaren van wijnen.
competitor.valueProposition: Geniet van een eigen ondergrondse wijnkelder in uw huidige woning, geplaatst in 4 tot 8 dagen, met de perfecte temperatuur, luchtvochtigheid en ventilatie voor uw wijnen.
competitor.targetAudience: Wijnliefhebbers en huiseigenaren in de BeNeLux die een professionele wijnkelder in hun bestaande of nieuwe woning willen realiseren zonder te hoeven verhuizen.
competitor.toneOfVoice: Informatief, professioneel en gericht op de passie voor wijn. De toon benadrukt technische expertise en het behoud van kwaliteit voor de wijnverzamelaar.
competitor.visualStyleNotes: De focus ligt op het visueel presenteren van de afgewerkte wijnkelders en de integratie van glazen luiken in de vloer, gericht op de beleving van de wijnliefhebber.
strengths: Duidelijke communicatie over technische voordelen voor wijn
weaknesses: Graafwerken en binnenafwerking niet inbegrepen in de 4-8 dagen
Zeer specifieke niche (alleen wijnkelders, geen algemene luiken)
Beperkte focus op de esthetiek en afwerking van het luik zelf
Geen vermelding van elektrische bediening of naadloze integratie

analysisData.description: Vinotilus is gespecialiseerd in het bouwen van ondergrondse wijnkelders onder bestaande of nieuwe woningen. Ze maken gebruik van het Franse Hélicave concept om binnen enkele dagen een volledig geventileerde en geklimatiseerde ruimte te creëren voor het optimaal bewaren van wijnen.
analysisData.toneOfVoice: Informatief, professioneel en gericht op de passie voor wijn. De toon benadrukt technische expertise en het behoud van kwaliteit voor de wijnverzamelaar.
analysisData.targetAudience: Wijnliefhebbers en huiseigenaren in de BeNeLux die een professionele wijnkelder in hun bestaande of nieuwe woning willen realiseren zonder te hoeven verhuizen.
analysisData.valueProposition: Geniet van een eigen ondergrondse wijnkelder in uw huidige woning, geplaatst in 4 tot 8 dagen, met de perfecte temperatuur, luchtvochtigheid en ventilatie voor uw wijnen.
analysisData.visualStyleNotes: De focus ligt op het visueel presenteren van de afgewerkte wijnkelders en de integratie van glazen luiken in de vloer, gericht op de beleving van de wijnliefhebber.

competitor.name: Gorter Hatches
competitor.description: Dutch manufacturer specializing in deck hatches, floor hatches, and access solutions for marine and building applications

competitor.name: Storax
competitor.description: Storax is al ruim 50 jaar een allround leverancier van een compleet programma bouwspecialiteiten. Het bedrijf levert en monteert onder andere entreematten, plinten, glasbalustrades, antislip oplossingen en duurzame dakluiken voor diverse sectoren.
competitor.tagline: Uw betrouwbare partner voor product en project
competitor.valueProposition: Storax ontzorgt als betrouwbare partner voor zowel product als project, met een breed assortiment bouwspecialiteiten, eigen productie in Nederland en een focus op duurzaamheid en montage.
competitor.targetAudience: Professionals in de bouw en utiliteit, waaronder aannemers en facilitair managers voor kantoren, scholen, ministeries, ziekenhuizen en de woningbouw.
differentiators: Eigen productie van entreematten in Nederland
Ambitie om in 2030 CO2-neutraal te zijn
competitor.toneOfVoice: Zakelijk, ervaren, betrouwbaar en oplossingsgericht. De communicatie is direct en sterk gericht op de B2B-markt, aannemers en projectontwikkelaars.
strengths: Grote naamsbekendheid en 50 jaar ervaring in de bouw
Zeer breed productportfolio voor diverse toepassingen
Biedt zowel levering als montage aan (full-service)
Sterke en bewezen positie in de utiliteitsbouw
weaknesses: Geen focus op het high-end luxe segment (Linfi's niche)
Vloerluiken worden niet specifiek genoemd, enkel dakluiken
Massa- en projectgerichte uitstraling mist exclusiviteit
Brede focus kan ten koste gaan van specialistisch maatwerk
